channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: UK: Aylesbury police officer found guilty of data protection breaches after snapping confidential information
item.description: James Lowson reports: A police officer based in Aylesbury was found guilty of breaching data protection laws after she photographed confidential information. At Reading Magistrates’ Court on April 28,...

item.title: Azerbaijani Energy Firm Hit by Repeated Microsoft Exchange Exploitation

item.title: [Webinar] How Modern Attack Paths Cross Code, Pipelines, and Cloud

item.title: Most Remediation Programs Never Confirm the Fix Actually Worked
